MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. of the Law Office of Jill Bates-Moore, Tel. 510.985.9250, appearing specially for the plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT STEVE BARBARICH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT. Motion to set aside default is granted. It does not appear that the Plaintiff was properly served, justifying his failure to respond under CCP 473. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Richard A. Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Continued To Apr-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Feb-21-2014 Continued To Mar-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., 510.985.9250, specially appearing for plaintiff State Farm General Insurance Company; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STEVE BARBARICH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued to March 24, 2014, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. In open court, the opposing party lodged a courtesy copy of the opposition. Counsel for plaintiff to provide notice of new hearing date to opposing counsel. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
